summary: Comprehensive testing of Fornitori (Suppliers) module - Backend API (16/16 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all features verified). The module correctly filters suppliers using client_type=fornitore which returns both 'fornitore' and 'cliente_fornitore' types.

issues: Page title shows 'Clienti / Fornitori' while sidebar shows 'Clienti'. This might be intentional as the Clients page can manage all client types, but should be clarified for consistency.

backend_api.Contacts array handling: PASS - Creates/persists contacts with document preferences

frontend_ui.Sidebar nav 'Fornitori': PASS - Factory icon, separate from Clienti
frontend_ui.Sidebar nav 'Clienti': PASS - Renamed from 'Clienti / Fornitori' to just 'Clienti'
frontend_ui.Empty state: PASS - Shows 'Nessun fornitore registrato' with 'Aggiungi Fornitore' button
frontend_ui.Table columns: PASS - Ragione Sociale, Tipo, P. IVA, Citta, Telefono, Pagamento

dialog_tabs.Tab Anagrafica: PASS - Ragione Sociale, Tipo (fornitore/cliente_fornitore only), Persona Fisica checkbox, P.IVA, C.F., Codice SDI (default 0000000), PEC
dialog_tabs.Tab Indirizzo: PASS - Via/Piazza/Localita, CAP, Comune, Prov., Paese (default IT)
dialog_tabs.Tab Contatti: PASS - Telefono, Cellulare, Fax, Email, Sito Web, Persone di Riferimento section
dialog_tabs.Tab Pagamento: PASS - Condizioni Pagamento dropdown, Banca, IBAN, link to create payment types

contact_person_subdialog.Fields: PASS - Tipo dropdown (Commerciale, Titolare, Amministrativo, Tecnico, Logistica, Altro), Nome, Telefono, Email
contact_person_subdialog.Document preferences: PASS - Checkboxes: Preventivi, Fatture, Solleciti Pagamento, Ordini, DDT

flows.Create supplier: PASS - Fill form → Save → Toast 'Fornitore creato' → Shows in list
flows.Edit supplier: PASS - Click row → Dialog 'Modifica Fornitore' → Pre-filled form
flows.Delete supplier: PASS - Click trash → Confirm dialog → Toast 'Fornitore eliminato'

critical_code_review_comments: client_type filter logic correctly uses $in for 'fornitore' and 'cliente' to include dual-role entities
FornitoriPage reuses /api/clients/ endpoint efficiently with query param filtering
Supplier type dropdown correctly restricts to 'fornitore' and 'cliente_fornitore' options only
Contact person document preferences (include_preventivi, include_fatture, etc.) properly implemented
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
test_credentials: Created test user via MongoDB (test-fornitori-*), cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test suppliers created during testing, cleaned up via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fornitori module fully tested. Key features: 1) Uses same /api/clients/ endpoint with client_type=fornitore filter. 2) client_type filter uses $in to include both pure type and dual-role (cliente_fornitore). 3) Supplier dialog only shows fornitore and cliente_fornitore options. 4) Contact persons have document preference checkboxes. 5) Sidebar now shows separate 'Clienti' and 'Fornitori' nav items.
